name: checkbox
visual_summary: A checkbox is a toggleable switch that typically consists of a box with a tick mark when checked. It can be used to let users choose one option from a list of available options. It's often used in forms and settings.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: checkbox
Description: A checkbox is a toggleable switch that typically consists of a box with a tick mark when checked. It can be used to let users choose one option from a list of available options. It's often used in forms and settings.
Style: minimal, flat
Interactions: clickable
Tags: interactive, form-control, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
